audit_items.proof_trace: Handler lacks epoch-based deprecation check. After FULU_FORK_EPOCH + MIN_EPOCHS_FOR_BLOB_SIDECARS_REQUESTS, the handler continues processing BlobsByRoot requests normally instead of rejecting them. No validation compares current_epoch against fulu_fork_epoch + min_epochs_for_blob_sidecars_requests threshold.
audit_items.attack_scenario: After deprecation threshold (FULU_FORK_EPOCH + 4096 epochs), any peer sends BlobsByRoot RPC request. Node processes it normally via handle_blobs_by_root_request_inner, responding with blobs if available, violating protocol spec deprecation requirement. Causes protocol non-compliance and resource waste on deprecated endpoints.
